title: zanthoxylum piperitum f. pubescens
intro: Zanthoxylum piperitum f. pubescens, also known as Korean prickly ash, is a variety of the Zanthoxylum piperitum plant, a type of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Korean prickly ash include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Korean prickly ash is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and can also be used in cooking, particularly in Korean cuisine.
